title: VMWARE INVESTOR ALERT BY THE FORMER ATTORNEY GENERAL OF LOUISIANA: Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC Investigates Adequacy of Price and Process in Proposed Sale of VMware, Inc. - VMW
text: NEW ORLEANS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Former Attorney General of Louisiana Charles C. Foti, Jr., Esq. and the law firm of Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC (“KSF”) are investigating the proposed sale of VMware, Inc. (NYSE: VMW) to Broadcom Inc. (NASDAQ: AVGO). Under the terms of the proposed transaction, shareholders of VMware will elect to receive either $142.50 in cash or 0.2520 shares of Broadcom for each share of VMware that they own, subject to proration. KSF is seeking to determine whether this consideration and the process that led to it are adequate, or whether the consideration undervalues the Company. If you believe that this transaction undervalues the Company and/or if you would like to discuss your legal rights regarding the proposed sale, you may, without obligation or cost to you, e-mail or call KSF Managing Partner Lewis S. Kahn (lewis.kahn@ksfcounsel.com) toll free at any time at 855-768-1857, or visit https://www.ksfcounsel.com/cases/nyse-vmw/ to learn more. To learn more about KSF, whose partners include the Former Louisiana Attorney General, visit www.ksfcounsel.com.

title: Broadcom Inc. (AVGO) CEO Hock Tan on Q2 2022 Results and VMware Acquisition (Transcript)
text: Broadcom Inc. (NASDAQ:AVGO ) Q2 2022 Results and VMware Acquisition Conference Call May 26, 2022 8:00 AM ET Company Participants Ji Yoo - Director of Investor Relations Hock Tan - President and Chief Executive Officer Kirsten Spears - Chief Financial Officer Tom Krause - President, Broadcom Software Group Charlie Kawwas - Chief Operating Officer Conference Call Participants Ross Seymore - Deutsche Bank Ambrish Srivastava - BMO Vivek Arya - Bank of America Securities Stacy Rasgon - Bernstein Research Harsh Kumar - Piper Sandler Toshiya Hari - Goldman Sachs Operator Welcome to Broadcom's Inc.'s VMware Transaction and Second Quarter Fiscal Year 2022 Financial Results Conference Call. At this time, for opening remarks and introductions, I would like to turn the call over to Ji Yoo, Director of Investor Relations of Broadcom Inc. Ji Yoo Thank you, operator, and good morning, everyone.
